description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI_Android that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main. Use a single macos-latest-large job that checks out the repository, sets up Java 8 with Zulu distribution, and then builds and tests an Android project using CMake and the Android NDK. Configure the build with a specific toolchain and platform, start an emulator in the background, wait for it to be ready, deploy tests, and run them.
